mapper.select: SELECT trip_id AS tripId, member_id AS memberId, trip_name AS tripName, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, description, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, is_public AS isPublic, total_budget AS totalBudget, CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(end_date) THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= TRUNC(start_date) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= TRUNC(end_date) THEN 'ONGOING' ELSE 'PLANNING' END AS status, scrap_count AS scrapCount, invite_code AS inviteCode, trip_type AS tripType, cities AS citiesStr FROM trip WHERE trip_id = #{tripId}

SELECT tm.member_id AS memberId, COALESCE(m.nickname, '알 수 없음') AS nickname, m.profile_image AS profileImage, tm.role, tm.invitation_status AS invitationStatus FROM trip_member tm LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = tm.member_id WHERE tm.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY CASE tm.role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN 'EDITOR' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, tm.joined_at ASC
SELECT t.tag_name FROM trip_tag tt JOIN tag t ON t.tag_id = tt.tag_id WHERE tt.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY tt.trip_tag_id ASC
SELECT tag_name FROM tag WHERE tag_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT trip_id AS tripId, trip_name AS tripName, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(end_date) THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= TRUNC(start_date) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= TRUNC(end_date) THEN 'ONGOING' ELSE 'PLANNING' END AS status, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, cities AS citiesStr, trip_type AS tripType, scrap_count AS scrapCount FROM trip WHERE is_public = 1 AND (trip_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR cities LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY scrap_count DESC, created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT t.trip_id AS tripId, t.trip_name AS tripName, TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, t.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, t.cities AS citiesStr, t.trip_type AS tripType, t.scrap_count AS scrapCount, t.description, m.nickname AS leaderNickname, m.profile_image AS leaderProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = t.trip_id AND target_type = 'TRIP') AS likeCount FROM trip t LEFT JOIN trip_member tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.role = 'OWNER' LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = tm.member_id WHERE t.is_public = 1 ORDER BY t.scrap_count DESC, t.created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 8 ROWS ONLY

SELECT t.trip_id AS tripId, t.trip_name AS tripName, TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, t.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, t.cities AS citiesStr, t.trip_type AS tripType, t.scrap_count AS scrapCount, m.nickname AS leaderNickname, m.profile_image AS leaderProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = t.trip_id AND target_type = 'TRIP') AS likeCount FROM trip t LEFT JOIN trip_member tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.role = 'OWNER' LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = tm.member_id WHERE t.is_public = 1 ORDER BY t.scrap_count DESC, t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT t.trip_id AS tripId, t.member_id AS memberId, t.trip_name AS tripName, TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(t.end_date) THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= TRUNC(t.start_date) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= TRUNC(t.end_date) THEN 'ONGOING' ELSE 'PLANNING' END AS status, t.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, t.cities AS citiesStr, t.trip_type AS tripType, t.total_budget AS totalBudget, t.is_public AS isPublic, t.invite_code AS inviteCode, t.scrap_count AS scrapCount, tm.role AS leaderNickname, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_member tm2 WHERE tm2.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm2.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED' ) AS regionId FROM trip t JOIN trip_member tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE tm.invitation_status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'PENDING') ORDER BY CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= TRUNC(t.start_date) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= TRUNC(t.end_date) THEN 0 WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) < TRUNC(t.start_date) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.start_date DESC

SELECT t.trip_id AS tripId, t.trip_name AS tripName, TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, t.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, t.cities AS citiesStr, t.trip_type AS tripType, t.scrap_count AS scrapCount, t.description, t.is_public AS isPublic, m.nickname AS leaderNickname, m.profile_image AS leaderProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = t.trip_id AND target_type = 'TRIP') AS likeCount FROM trip t LEFT JOIN trip_member tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.role = 'OWNER' LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = tm.member_id WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND t.is_public = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.trip_id AS tripId, t.trip_name AS tripName, t.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, t.cities AS citiesStr, t.scrap_count AS scrapCount, m.nickname AS leaderNickname FROM trip t LEFT JOIN trip_member tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.role = 'OWNER' LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = tm.member_id WHERE t.is_public = 1 AND t.trip_id != #{tripId} AND ( t.cities LIKE '%' || #{cityKeyword} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trip_tag tt JOIN trip_tag tt2 ON tt2.tag_id = tt.tag_id WHERE tt.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tt2.trip_id = #{tripId} ) ) ORDER BY t.scrap_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{tripId} AND target_type = 'TRIP'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{tripId} AND target_type = 'TRIP' AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (like_id, member_id, target_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (SEQ_LIKES_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{tripId}, 'TRIP', SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{tripId} AND target_type = 'TRIP' AND member_id = #{memberId}
